name: Ghar Tera Mera
overview: Rishabh clings to his late father’s villa amid mounting debts and fierce battles over ownership with Rina, who claims the house as her inheritance. Their rivalry spirals into comic warfare, complicated by quirky allies, failed business attempts, and secrets from the past
